query:
INSERT INTO "ob-poc".outstanding_requests (
                subject_type, subject_id,
                case_id,
                request_type, request_subtype,
                request_details,
                requested_by_agent,
                created_by_verb
            ) VALUES (
                COALESCE($1, 'ENTITY'), $2,
                $3,
                $4, $5,
                $6,
                true,
                $7
            )
            RETURNING request_id
